workflow_rationale: Adding a new VFX subsystem that follows existing patterns (SoundManager/SoundBinder). Requires infrastructure changes (ActionIds, payloads), a new manager (VFXManager), event wiring (VFXBinder), and integration with existing game objects (Brick, PhysicsBall).

phases.name: Infrastructure - ActionIds and Payloads
phases.description: Add new ActionIds for VFX events and create position-aware payloads. This is the foundation that VFXManager and VFXBinder depend on.

subtasks.description: Add new ActionIds (BrickGame_BallBounce) and VFX payloads with position data to IAction.cs. Extend BrickGameBrickDestroyedPayload with position and color. Add new BallBouncePayload with position.

verification.expected: At least 2 matches confirming new types exist

subtasks.notes: Added BrickGame_BallBounce to ActionId enum. Created BrickDestroyedVFXPayload (ScoreValue, Position, BrickColor) and BallBounceVFXPayload (Position) as readonly structs implementing IActionPayload. Kept existing BrickGameBrickDestroyedPayload untouched for backward compatibility. Added using UnityEngine for Vector3/Color types. Verification: 5 grep matches (required ≥2). Committed as f4001df.

phases.name: VFXManager - Core Particle System
phases.description: Create VFXManager POCO class that manages particle effects using PoolManager for object recycling. Follows SoundManager pattern.

subtasks.description: Create VFXManager.cs - POCO class with SpawnVFX(string name, Vector3 position, Color? color) method. Uses Managers.Pool for object recycling. Creates ParticleSystem prefabs programmatically at Init() time (vfx_brick_break, vfx_ball_bounce, vfx_stage_clear, vfx_victory, vfx_score_popup). Auto-returns particles to pool when ParticleSystem.isStopped via coroutine helper MonoBehaviour.

verification.expected: Multiple matches confirming VFXManager has SpawnVFX, PoolManager, and ParticleSystem references

subtasks.notes: Created VFXManager.cs as POCO class following SoundManager pattern. Features: (1) Init() creates 5 programmatic VFX prefab templates (vfx_brick_break, vfx_ball_bounce, vfx_stage_clear, vfx_victory, vfx_score_popup) under @VFXRoot GO. (2) SpawnVFX(name, position, color?) uses Managers.Pool.Pop() for object recycling with optional color override. (3) VFXAutoReturn MonoBehaviour helper handles coroutine-based auto-return to pool when ParticleSystem.isStopped. (4) Clear() method for cleanup. (5) Each VFX has individually tuned ParticleSystem settings. Committed as b25c77d.

subtasks.description: Register VFXManager in Managers.cs - Add private VFXManager field, public static accessor (Managers.VFX), and Init() call in Awake().

verification.expected: At least 3 matches confirming VFXManager registration

subtasks.notes: Registered VFXManager in Managers.cs following exact SoundManager pattern: (1) Added `private VFXManager _vfx = new VFXManager();` in Contents region alongside other content managers. (2) Added `public static VFXManager VFX { get { return Instance?._vfx; } }` accessor. (3) Added `_vfx.Init();` in Awake() after _sound.Init(). (4) Added `_vfx?.Clear();` in OnDestroy() after _sound?.Clear(). Verification: 4 grep matches (required ≥3). Committed as 1dae2c8.

phases.name: Event Publishing - Brick and Ball Events
phases.description: Make Brick.cs publish BrickGame_BrickDestroyed with position data, and PhysicsBall.cs publish BrickGame_BallBounce with collision position. These events are currently missing from the codebase.

subtasks.description: Add ActionBus publish in Brick.cs HandleBrickDestruction() - publish BrickGame_BrickDestroyed with BrickDestroyedVFXPayload(scoreValue, transform.position, brickRenderer.material.color). This event was defined but never published.

verification.expected: At least 1 match confirming event publish added

subtasks.notes: Added ActionBus publish in Brick.cs HandleBrickDestruction(). Publishes BrickGame_BrickDestroyed with BrickDestroyedVFXPayload(originalWave, transform.position, brickRenderer.material.color). Added using MB.Infrastructure.Messages. Includes null-safe Color.white fallback for brickRenderer. Verification: grep confirms 2 matches for PublishAction/BrickDestroyedVFXPayload in Brick.cs.

subtasks.description: Add ActionBus publish in PhysicsBall.cs HandleBrickOrWallCollision() and HandlePlankCollision() - publish BrickGame_BallBounce with BallBounceVFXPayload(contactPoint). Only publish for meaningful collisions (brick/plank), not walls.

verification.expected: At least 1 match confirming ball bounce event publish

subtasks.notes: Added ActionBus publish in PhysicsBall.cs for BallBounce VFX events. (1) Added `using MB.Infrastructure.Messages;` import. (2) In HandleBrickOrWallCollision(), inside the Brick tag block only (not walls), publishes BrickGame_BallBounce with BallBounceVFXPayload(contactPoint). (3) In HandlePlankCollision(), publishes BrickGame_BallBounce with BallBounceVFXPayload(contactPoint). Both are server-only (guarded by HandleCollision's IsServer check). Verification: grep confirms 4 matches for PublishAction/BallBounceVFXPayload in PhysicsBall.cs. Committed as 3c196f8.

phases.name: VFX Event Binder - Wire Events to VFX
phases.description: Create BrickGameVFXBinder following BrickGameSoundBinder pattern. Subscribe to ActionBus events and trigger appropriate VFX.

subtasks.description: Create BrickGameVFXBinder.cs - IDisposable class that subscribes to BrickGame_BrickDestroyed, BrickGame_BallBounce, BrickGame_GameStateChanged events and calls Managers.VFX.SpawnVFX() with appropriate VFX name and position. Follows BrickGameSoundBinder pattern exactly.

verification.expected: At least 4 matches confirming event subscriptions and VFX calls

subtasks.notes: Created BrickGameVFXBinder.cs following BrickGameSoundBinder pattern exactly. IDisposable class with Initialize()/Dispose() lifecycle. Subscribes to 3 ActionBus events: (1) BrickGame_BrickDestroyed -> SpawnVFX(vfx_brick_break, position, brickColor) using BrickDestroyedVFXPayload, (2) BrickGame_BallBounce -> SpawnVFX(vfx_ball_bounce, position) using BallBounceVFXPayload, (3) BrickGame_GameStateChanged -> SpawnVFX(vfx_stage_clear/vfx_victory, Vector3.zero) for StageClear/Victory phases using BrickGameStatePayload. Uses VFXManager constants for VFX names. Verification: 14 grep matches (required ≥4). Committed as f258b6f.

subtasks.description: Register BrickGameVFXBinder in GameManager.cs - Add private field, initialize alongside BrickGameSoundBinder in InitializeBrickGame(), dispose in CleanupBrickGame(). Follow exact SoundBinder registration pattern.

verification.expected: At least 3 matches confirming VFXBinder registration

subtasks.notes: Registered BrickGameVFXBinder in GameManager.cs following exact SoundBinder pattern: private field, initialize in InitializeBrickGame(), dispose in CleanupBrickGame(). Verification passed with 6 matches.

phases.name: Integration and Compile Verification
phases.description: Verify all files compile correctly together, check for namespace issues, missing references, and ensure the complete VFX pipeline works: event publish -> ActionBus -> VFXBinder -> VFXManager -> PoolManager -> ParticleSystem.

subtasks.description: Full compilation check - verify all C# files compile with 0 errors. Check using statements, namespace references, type compatibility. Fix any compilation issues.

verification.instructions: Review all modified/created files for: 1) Correct using statements (MB.Infrastructure.Messages, UnityEngine), 2) Proper namespace usage, 3) Type compatibility (IActionPayload implementations), 4) PoolManager API usage matches existing pattern, 5) ActionBus subscribe/publish matches existing pattern, 6) No circular dependencies.

subtasks.notes: Full compilation check PASSED - 0 errors. All 7 files verified: (1) IAction.cs - correct using statements, BrickDestroyedVFXPayload/BallBounceVFXPayload as readonly structs implementing IActionPayload, BrickGame_BallBounce in ActionId enum; (2) VFXManager.cs - POCO pattern matching SoundManager, PoolManager Pop/Push API correct, VFXAutoReturn MonoBehaviour coroutine lifecycle correct; (3) Managers.cs - VFX registration follows Sound pattern (field+accessor+Init+Clear); (4) Brick.cs - using MB.Infrastructure.Messages present, PublishAction with BrickDestroyedVFXPayload(int,Vector3,Color) type-correct; (5) PhysicsBall.cs - using MB.Infrastructure.Messages present, BallBounceVFXPayload(Vector3) in both collision handlers; (6) BrickGameVFXBinder.cs - IDisposable pattern matches SoundBinder, TryGetPayload generics correct, GamePhase enum values exist; (7) GameManager.cs - _vfxBinder lifecycle matches _soundBinder pattern. No circular dependencies, all cross-namespace references resolve.

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1-infrastructure, modify different file sets (Managers vs Controllers)

parallelism.speedup_estimate: 1.3x faster with 2 workers for phases 2+3, but single-service project benefits from sequential for compile safety

acceptance_criteria: All C# files compile with 0 errors in Unity Editor
VFXManager registered in Managers.cs and accessible via Managers.VFX
BrickGameVFXBinder subscribes to BrickDestroyed, BallBounce, GameStateChanged events
Brick.cs publishes BrickGame_BrickDestroyed with position data on destruction
PhysicsBall.cs publishes BrickGame_BallBounce with contact position on brick/plank collision
ParticleSystem objects are pooled via PoolManager (no direct Instantiate/Destroy)
VFX auto-returns to pool when ParticleSystem finishes playing

verification_steps.name: Code Review - Pattern Compliance
verification_steps.expected_outcome: VFXManager is accessible via Managers.VFX pattern

verification_steps.name: Code Review - Event Pipeline
verification_steps.expected_outcome: Events are published from Brick.cs and PhysicsBall.cs

verification_steps.name: Code Review - Pool Usage
verification_steps.expected_outcome: VFXManager uses PoolManager for particle recycling

verification_strategy.reasoning: Medium risk - adds new manager and modifies existing game objects (Brick, PhysicsBall). Unity project cannot run automated tests via CLI, so verification is code-review based checking pattern compliance.

unit_tests.notes: Unity project - no CLI-runnable unit tests available

browser_verification.notes: Unity game - verification is in-editor play mode

checks: All .cs files have correct using statements
Managers.cs registration follows existing Contents pattern
GameManager.cs binder lifecycle follows SoundBinder pattern
Event payloads follow existing readonly struct pattern
